---
title: "My library"
lang: en
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    css: ../assets/library/library.css
resources:
  - ../assets/library/library-data.json
---

::: {#library-app .library-app data-lang="en" data-source="../assets/library/library-data.json"}

::: {.library-hero aria-labelledby="library-title"}
::: {.library-shell .library-hero-layout}
::: {.library-hero-copy}
<h1 id="library-title">My library</h1>

<p class="library-lead">A living collection of <span data-total-books>557</span> distinct editions derived from <span data-total-source-records>571</span> CLZ records, spanning mathematics classics, statistics, data science, and scientific curiosities.</p>

::: {.library-actions}
<button class="library-button library-button-primary" id="library-explore" type="button"><i class="bi bi-book" aria-hidden="true"></i>Explore the catalogue</button>
<button class="library-button library-button-secondary" id="library-random" type="button"><i class="bi bi-shuffle" aria-hidden="true"></i>Pick a random book</button>
:::

::: {.library-hero-metrics aria-label="Collection overview"}
::: {.library-hero-metric}
<i class="bi bi-bookshelf" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<span class="library-metric-value" data-total-books>557</span>
<span class="library-metric-label">editions · <span data-total-source-records>571</span> source records</span>
:::
::: {.library-hero-metric}
<i class="bi bi-calendar3" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<span class="library-metric-value" data-year-range>1887-2025</span>
<span class="library-metric-label">years covered</span>
:::
::: {.library-hero-metric}
<i class="bi bi-building" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<span class="library-metric-value" data-publisher-count>167</span>
<span class="library-metric-label">publishers</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.library-hero-visual}
<div class="library-hero-shelf" id="library-hero-shelf" aria-label="Selection of books from the catalogue"></div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.library-analysis aria-labelledby="analysis-title"}
::: {.library-shell}
<h2 id="analysis-title">What the collection reveals</h2>
<p class="library-section-intro">A few descriptive landmarks calculated from the reviewed and enriched CLZ catalogue.</p>

::: {.library-analysis-grid}
::: {.library-chart-panel}
<h3>Books by decade</h3>
<div id="library-decade-chart" class="library-decade-chart"></div>
:::
::: {.library-chart-panel .library-publisher-panel}
<h3>Most represented publishers</h3>
<div id="library-publisher-chart" class="library-publisher-chart"></div>
:::
:::

::: {.library-insight-strip aria-label="Data quality indicators"}
::: {.library-insight}
<i class="bi bi-calendar-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<span>Median year</span>
<strong data-median-year>1996</strong>
:::
::: {.library-insight}
<i class="bi bi-calendar-range" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<span>Period</span>
<strong data-year-range>1887-2025</strong>
:::
::: {.library-insight}
<i class="bi bi-book" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<span>Year recorded</span>
<strong><span data-known-year-count>557</span> editions</strong>
:::
::: {.library-insight}
<i class="bi bi-upc-scan" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<span>ISBN to review</span>
<strong><span data-review-isbn-count>19</span> entries</strong>
:::
:::

<p class="library-method-note"><i class="bi bi-info-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i>The <span data-pre1970-missing-isbn-count>84</span> editions published before 1970 without an ISBN are classified as expected. Author and publisher variants are grouped through an explicit normalization table that preserves the original CLZ labels.</p>
:::
:::

::: {.library-atlas aria-labelledby="atlas-title"}
::: {.library-shell}
::: {.library-section-heading}
<p class="library-eyebrow">Thematic map</p>
<h2 id="atlas-title">The library atlas</h2>
<p class="library-section-intro">Explore the collection’s main intellectual territories. Each territory’s area is proportional to its number of books.</p>
:::

::: {.library-atlas-layout}
<div id="library-theme-map" class="library-theme-map" aria-label="Interactive distribution of books by theme"></div>
<aside id="library-theme-detail" class="library-theme-detail" aria-live="polite"></aside>
:::

<button id="library-theme-reset" class="library-inline-action" type="button"><i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise" aria-hidden="true"></i>Overview</button>
<p class="library-method-note"><i class="bi bi-info-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i>The classification applies reproducible rules to title, genre, and series fields. A record without explicit evidence remains in “To classify.”</p>
:::
:::

::: {.library-timeline aria-labelledby="timeline-title"}
::: {.library-shell}
::: {.library-section-heading .library-section-heading-row}
::: {}
<p class="library-eyebrow">1887 to 2025</p>
<h2 id="timeline-title">The collection through time</h2>
<p class="library-section-intro">Choose a decade to see its weight in the collection and open a few books from that period.</p>
:::
<button id="library-timeline-reset" class="library-inline-action" type="button"><i class="bi bi-arrows-fullscreen" aria-hidden="true"></i>Full period</button>
:::

<p id="library-timeline-status" class="library-viz-status" aria-live="polite"></p>
<div id="library-timeline-chart" class="library-timeline-chart" aria-label="Interactive timeline of books by decade"></div>
::: {.library-timeline-nav aria-label="Navigate between decades"}
<button id="library-timeline-prev" type="button"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left" aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Previous decade</span></button>
<button id="library-timeline-next" type="button"><span>Next decade</span><i class="bi bi-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i></button>
:::
<div id="library-timeline-books" class="library-timeline-books"></div>
:::
:::

::: {.library-rarity aria-labelledby="rarity-title"}
::: {.library-shell}
::: {.library-rarity-heading}
<p class="library-rarity-kicker"><i class="bi bi-gem" aria-hidden="true"></i>Documentary rarity</p>
<h2 id="rarity-title">The 5 rarest books</h2>
<p class="library-rarity-intro">Five early volumes whose metadata is complete enough to support a transparent ranking.</p>
:::

<div id="library-rarity-grid" class="library-rarity-grid"></div>

<p class="library-rarity-method"><i class="bi bi-shield-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>This reproducible ranking selects the five oldest complete records published before 1970 without an ISBN. It measures documentary rarity within this catalogue, not market value or the number of surviving copies. <span data-rarity-excluded>3</span> older but incomplete records remain outside the ranking.</p>
:::
:::

::: {.library-network aria-labelledby="network-title"}
::: {.library-shell}
::: {.library-section-heading}
<p class="library-eyebrow">Connections</p>
<h2 id="network-title">The collection network</h2>
<p class="library-section-intro">See how themes connect authors and publishers. Select a node to isolate its neighbourhood.</p>
:::

::: {.library-network-toolbar}
::: {.library-search-wrap .library-network-search-wrap}
<i class="bi bi-search" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<label class="visually-hidden" for="library-network-search">Search for an author or publisher in the network</label>
<input id="library-network-search" type="search" placeholder="Search for an author or publisher" autocomplete="off">
:::
<button id="library-network-recenter" class="library-inline-action" type="button"><i class="bi bi-bullseye" aria-hidden="true"></i>Recenter</button>
<button id="library-network-all" class="library-inline-action" type="button"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3" aria-hidden="true"></i>Overview</button>
:::

::: {.library-network-layout}
<div id="library-network-canvas" class="library-network-canvas" aria-label="Interactive network of themes, authors, and publishers"></div>
<aside id="library-network-detail" class="library-network-detail" aria-live="polite"></aside>
:::

::: {.library-network-legend aria-label="Network legend"}
<span><i class="library-legend-theme" aria-hidden="true"></i>Theme</span>
<span><i class="library-legend-author" aria-hidden="true"></i>Author</span>
<span><i class="library-legend-publisher" aria-hidden="true"></i>Publisher</span>
<span><i class="library-legend-selected" aria-hidden="true"></i>Selection</span>
:::
<p class="library-method-note"><i class="bi bi-info-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i>A connection means that at least one book links the two nodes. Its width represents the number of books involved; no relationship is inferred beyond the catalogue.</p>
:::
:::

::: {.library-cover-wall aria-labelledby="cover-wall-title"}
::: {.library-shell}
::: {.library-section-heading}
<p class="library-eyebrow">Visual gallery</p>
<h2 id="cover-wall-title">The cover wall</h2>
<p class="library-section-intro">A visual reading of the collection, one cover at a time.</p>
:::

::: {.library-wall-toolbar}
::: {.library-field}
<label for="library-wall-decade">Decade</label>
<select id="library-wall-decade"><option value="">All decades</option></select>
:::
::: {.library-field}
<label for="library-wall-theme">Theme</label>
<select id="library-wall-theme"><option value="">All themes</option></select>
:::
<button id="library-wall-shuffle" class="library-inline-action" type="button"><i class="bi bi-shuffle" aria-hidden="true"></i>Shuffle</button>
:::
<p id="library-wall-status" class="library-viz-status" aria-live="polite"></p>
<div id="library-cover-wall-grid" class="library-cover-wall-grid"></div>
::: {.library-load-wrap}
<button id="library-wall-more" class="library-button library-button-secondary" type="button">Show more covers</button>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.library-catalogue aria-labelledby="catalogue-title"}
::: {.library-shell}
<h2 id="catalogue-title">Browse the shelves</h2>
<p class="library-section-intro">Search by title, author, ISBN, or publisher.</p>

::: {.library-search-wrap}
<i class="bi bi-search" aria-hidden="true"></i>
<label class="visually-hidden" for="library-search">Search the catalogue</label>
<input id="library-search" type="search" placeholder="Search 557 books" autocomplete="off">
:::

::: {.library-filter-rail}
::: {.library-field}
<label for="library-decade">Decade</label>
<select id="library-decade"><option value="">All decades</option></select>
:::
::: {.library-field}
<label for="library-publisher">Publisher</label>
<select id="library-publisher"><option value="">All publishers</option></select>
:::
::: {.library-field}
<label for="library-sort">Sort by</label>
<select id="library-sort">
  <option value="catalogue">Catalogue order</option>
  <option value="title">Title, A to Z</option>
  <option value="author">Author, A to Z</option>
  <option value="newest">Year, newest first</option>
  <option value="oldest">Year, oldest first</option>
</select>
:::
<button id="library-reset" class="library-reset" type="button">Reset</button>
:::

::: {.library-result-head}
<p id="library-result-count" aria-live="polite">557 books</p>
:::

<div id="library-book-grid" class="library-book-grid"></div>
<div id="library-empty" class="library-empty" hidden>No books match these criteria.</div>

::: {.library-load-wrap}
<button id="library-load-more" class="library-button library-button-secondary" type="button">Show 24 more books</button>
:::

<p class="library-cover-note"><span data-cover-count>454</span> editions, or <span data-cover-rate>81.5</span>% of the catalogue, now have a cover supplied by bibliographic indexes, publishers, booksellers, or digitized collections. Exact ISBN matches take priority; books without an ISBN require a strict title, author, year, and publisher match.</p>
<p class="library-source-note">Primary source: CLZ Books export dated July 14, 2026. All 571 source records remain traceable; 14 duplicate groups are presented as 557 editions. Grouped source records do not establish the number of physical copies. Empty bibliographic fields were completed through exact ISBN matches with Open Library. Generic images that do not represent the actual cover are excluded. Each external cover retains its provider, matching method, and provenance link in the catalogue.</p>
:::
:::

<dialog id="library-dialog" class="library-dialog" aria-labelledby="library-dialog-title">
<button id="library-dialog-close" class="library-dialog-close" type="button" aria-label="Close book details"><i class="bi bi-x-lg" aria-hidden="true"></i></button>
<div id="library-dialog-content"></div>
</dialog>

<div id="library-error" class="library-error" hidden>The catalogue cannot be loaded right now.</div>
:::

<script src="../assets/library/library.js" defer></script>
